zh.Harberton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文哈波頓
zh.Totnes, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文托特斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p.於1187年出生在英國戴文哈波頓時，他的父親Roger de Valletort22歲，母親Alesia de Columbieres38歲。他於1210年與Jane Basset在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1246年在英國可瓦爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.Harberton, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文哈波頓
zh-hans.Totnes, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文托特斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p.于1187年出生在英国戴文哈波頓时，他的父亲Roger de Valletort22岁，母亲Alesia de Columbieres38岁。他于1210年与Jane Basset在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1246年在英国可瓦爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. was born in 1187, in Harberton, Devon, England, his father, Roger de Valletort, was 22 and his mother, Alesia de Columbieres, was 38. He married Jane Basset in 1210, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1246, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. est né en 1187, à Harberton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Valletort, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alesia de Columbieres, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Jane Basset en 1210, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1246, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. 1187 in Harberton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Valletort 22 und seine Mutter Alesia de Columbieres 38. Er hat 1210 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Jane Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1246 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. è nato il nel 1187 nel Harberton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Roger de Valletort, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Alesia de Columbieres, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Jane Basset nel 1210, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1246, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p.が1187年にイギリスデボンハーバートンで生まれた時，父Roger de Valletortは22歳，母Alesia de Columbieresは38歳であった。1210年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでJane Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1246年にイギリスコルンワルで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p.(이)가 1187년 영국 데폰 하르버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Valletort(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Alesia de Columbieres(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Jane Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1246년 영국 코른월에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. nasceu em 1187, em Harberton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Valletort, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alesia de Columbieres, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Basset em 1210, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1246, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. родился в 1187 г. в местности харбиртон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Valletort было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alesia de Columbieres, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Basset в 1210 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1246 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. nació en 1187, en Harberton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Valletort, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alesia de Columbieres, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Jane Basset en 1210, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1246, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
